summary: Very good recording of an early‑80s Grateful Dead show, hailed as a keeper despite limited detail on the performance.
review: The reviewer rates this capture four stars, calling it "very good" and noting the venue’s reputation for producing quality recordings in the 1983‑85 period. No specific songs or musical moments are highlighted, but the overall sentiment is that the show is enjoyable and worth repeated listening.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4★) emphasizes good recording quality and general enjoyment; lack of detailed performance info leads to a solid but not outstanding rating.
